name: Todoist
description: Todoist task and project management platform. Find tasks and sections, add comments to tasks, and move tasks between sections.

tools.name: find_tasks
tools.description: Retrieve active tasks from Todoist with optional filtering by project, section, label, or a custom filter string. Returns an array of task objects including IDs, content, descriptions, due dates, priorities, labels, and section assignments. Supports comma-separated task IDs for bulk retrieval.

filter.description: Filter by any supported Todoist filter query (e.g. 'today', 'overdue', 'priority 1').

ids.description: A comma-separated list of task IDs to retrieve specific tasks.

tools.name: find_sections
tools.description: Retrieve all sections from Todoist, optionally filtered by project ID. Returns an array of section objects including their IDs, names, project IDs, and ordering. Useful for discovering section IDs before moving tasks between sections.

project_id.description: Filter sections by project ID. If omitted, returns sections from all projects.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Create a new comment on a Todoist task or project. Provide the task_id (or project_id) and the comment content. Content supports markdown formatting and hyperlinks. Returns the created comment object with its ID and timestamp.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to comment on. Either task_id or project_id is required.

project_id.description: The ID of the project to comment on. Either task_id or project_id is required.

content.description: The comment text content. Supports markdown formatting and hyperlinks.

tools.name: move_task
tools.description: Move a task to a different section by updating its section_id. You can also update other task properties at the same time such as content, description, labels, priority, and due date. Returns the updated task object.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to move.

section_id.description: The ID of the target section to move the task into.

content.description: Optionally update the task content at the same time.

description.description: Optionally update the task description at the same time.

labels.description: Optionally update the task labels at the same time.

due_string.description: Optionally update the due date using natural language (e.g. 'tomorrow', 'next Monday').
